case_title: CINDY NGUYEN VS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,176.40 FILED BY CINDY NGUYEN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
